summary: Phase M0 verifier findings M0-001 through M0-012 are resolved without adding implementation code or M1+ scope. The seven Draft domain specs now define exact reference-environment and content identities, concrete governance and CLI error schemas, bounded CI evidence and permissions, complete canonical performance schemas and deterministic comparator arithmetic, exact corpus wire/report/observation contracts, a finite cross-domain resource-limit inventory, one scoped dependency-acquisition network capability, and finite pull-request/release secret-scan populations. SPECS.md retains all M0 rows as Draft with accurate dependencies. No owner clarification is required.
